traps: transitGatewayVpc is a SUB-SERVICE of amazonVirtualPrivateCloud (manifest subType: 'subService'). When the agent calls add_service('transitGatewayVpc', ...), EstimateBuilder automatically wraps it in the VPC parent envelope at save time. Same pattern as networkAddressTranslationNatGatewayVpc and the other VPC children — call add_service with the child code, not the parent.

Pricing has TWO components: $0.05/attachment-hour (always-on while provisioned, regardless of traffic) plus $0.02/GB ingress data processed. One always-on attachment alone is ~$36.50/mo (730 × $0.05); data processed adds the per-GB component on top.

The multicast fields (Number_of_multicast_receivers, Multicast_data_processed_per_Transit_Gateway_receiver) only apply if the TGW attachment has multicast enabled. Most production TGW usage is non-multicast — safe to omit those fields entirely. They use snake_case_with_underscores, unusual for the calculator (most fields are camelCase).
